finding_results.notes: Compressed the recap before Joel arrives, kept a single explicit articulation of Paul's realization, and replaced the closing thematic restatement with a concrete concealment decision built around the lawyer's number and Paul's choice not to tell the house yet.

summary: Reworked the chapter close so the will and memory sequence carry Paul's realization, then ended on a fresh pressure beat: he withholds the news from Joel and decides to call Martin's lawyer in private before anyone else can turn it into group talk.
